driAgentMonmon.title: Monmon (DRI Yang)
driAgentMonmon.description: Add Monmon to your Digimon party

requisites.partyLevel: Have a party level between 60 and 90

1.description: Look for Dri Yang in Mobius Desert

2.description: Defeat Armormon in battle to receive Monmon's DDNA

3.description: Deliver Monmon's DNA to DRI Yang
